basic_details.short_information: Karmayogi Bharat Recruitment 2026 for 1 posts of Database Administrator. Candidates with B.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 22-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Karmayogi Bharat official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Database Administration, or related field required; Master’s Degree preferred, Certifications in database administration (e.g., Oracle Certified Professional, Microsoft Certified Database Administrator), 6+ Years Experience with cloud-based databases and migration strategies w.r.t. SQL Server, Postgres, MongoDB, Familiarity with HR systems or eHRMS 2.0 platforms

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Karmayogi Bharat Database Administrator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Karmayogi Bharat Database Administrator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
